name: compose_skill
description: Agent skills for Jetpack Compose development — coding assistant + audit tool

plugins.name: compose-agent
plugins.description: Agent skill that helps AI coding assistants write modern Jetpack Compose: correct state, effects, performance-aware modifiers, Navigation 3, coroutines on lifecycle, and idiomatic Kotlin.

plugins.name: jetpack-compose-audit
plugins.description: Strict, evidence-based audit for Android Jetpack Compose repositories. Produces a 0-100 score with every deduction cited against developer.android.com.
